Dialog.name: MSG_ARBEIT_CAFE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Serve coffee that boosts a person's charm![n]Time: Night[n]Pay: ¥2,500+ daily[n]Location: Paulownia Mall[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ARBEIT_SKILLSHOP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Those with knowledge of minerals welcome![n]Time: Day[n]Pay: ¥3,500+ daily[n]Location: Paulownia Mall[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ARBEIT_MOVIE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Inspire people to learn and be courageous![n]Time: Day[n]Pay: ¥5,000+ daily[n]Location: In front of Port Island Station[n]{f 1 1}
